title: Peribronchial cuffing: an underrecognized pattern of prostate carcinoma metastases to the lung.
abstract: Prostate cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related morbidity and mortality in men, with a subset of patients developing aggressive, castrate-resistant disease. We describe an underrecognized pattern of thoracic metastasis - peribronchial cuffing - in patients with advanced prostate cancer, with the aim to elucidate clinical, radiographic, and pathologic features and thus facilitate early recognition and management.
